New notifications since last run: Carly Baker accepted friend request (15h, new connection), Junk Removal Owners group ad post (14h, generic — skipped). Also surfaced previously-missed unread notifications: URGENT FB advertising restriction notice (3d — flagged for Vito's attention), Rico Cocchi accepted friend request (3d), Cheryl Provost likes your photo (4d), Superior Commercial Cleaning LLC tagged you in a photo in Commercial Cleaning Support Group (4d — logged as Qualified lead in Notion), Homeowners looking for Contractors and Remodelers group description update (4d, generic), Ann Giroux accepted friend request (5d), Liam Nowak accepted friend request (18h). Messenger inbox: Ryan Bailey outreach DM (sent Fri 9:02 PM, 13h ago) still unanswered. Liam Nowak, Rico Cocchi, Ann Giroux chats all empty (newly connected). Message requests: empty. Spam: Room Full of Love 4813 / Holmes Renee link (20h, same as prior run — unchanged). Archived: empty. Delta this run: 0 new inbound comments, 0 new DMs, 0 interest signals. Notion: 1 Qualified lead logged (Superior Commercial Cleaning LLC). Cumulative totals unchanged: 18 groups, 116 comments, 39 positive, 4 DMs, 13 interest signals.
